VAL-CLI-001.notes: User testing validation: swell task creates task and returns UUID

VAL-CLI-002.notes: User testing validation: swell list shows tasks with their states in table format

VAL-CLI-003.notes: User testing validation: swell watch shows state transitions for task

VAL-CLI-004.notes: User testing validation: swell cancel transitions task to FAILED, swell approve returns proper error for task without plan

VAL-DAEMON-001.notes: Daemon Unix socket communication verified working via nc and Python socket testing. TaskCreate and TaskList return correct JSON responses.

VAL-DAEMON-002.notes: Daemon graceful shutdown verified - SIGTERM properly handled, active connections completed, socket file removed, clean shutdown logged.

VAL-DAEMON-003.notes: Daemon error handling verified - returns structured JSON error responses for invalid commands.

VAL-ORCH-006.notes: User testing validation: Feature leads spawned for tasks exceeding 15-step threshold. Unit tests verify sub-orchestrator spawning and delegation.

VAL-ORCH-007.notes: User testing validation: Gap analyzer identifies missing requirements from spec vs codebase. Unit tests verify spec parsing, gap detection, and reporting.

VAL-ORCH-008.notes: User testing validation: Follow-up task generation from completion and acceptance criteria. Unit tests verify proposal generation from plan steps.

VAL-ORCH-009.notes: User testing validation: Frozen spec rejects tasks that don't trace to original requirements. FrozenRequirementRegistry wired into Orchestrator.

VAL-ORCH-010.notes: User testing validation: File locks prevent concurrent access to same files. Unit tests verify lock acquisition, release, and concurrent access prevention.

VAL-ORCH-011.notes: User testing validation: Autonomy enforcement at L1-L4 configurable levels. Unit tests verify approval requirement enforcement at each level.

VAL-ORCH-012.notes: User testing validation: Tiered context pipeline with token budget management. Unit tests verify multi-tier assembly and budget enforcement.

VAL-ORCH-013.notes: User testing validation: Work graph data structure for task dependencies and complexity. Unit tests verify node management, dependencies, and serialization.

VAL-ORCH-014.notes: User testing validation: Confidence-based pausing when agent uncertainty exceeds threshold. Unit tests and integration tests verify pausing behavior.

VAL-ORCH-015.notes: User testing validation: Session hygiene prevents context bloat over time. Unit tests verify context condensation and memory management.

VAL-ORCH-016.notes: User testing validation: Non-novel retry detection prevents infinite loops. Unit tests verify duplicate task detection and loop prevention.

VAL-VALIDATION-001.notes: Validated via cargo test (swell-validation): LintGate executes and reports pass/fail. 401 tests in swell-validation passed including LintGate.validate tests.

VAL-VALIDATION-002.notes: Validated via cargo test (swell-validation): TestGate executes test suite and reports results. All validation gate tests pass.

VAL-VALIDATION-003.notes: Validated via cargo test (swell-validation): ValidationPipeline runs multiple gates in order. Pipeline orchestration tests pass.

VAL-VALIDATION-004.notes: Validated via cargo test (swell-validation): ValidationContext contains task_id, workspace_path, changed_files. Context construction tests pass.

VAL-SKILLS-001.notes: User testing validation: skills discovered from .swell/skills/ directory. 18 tests in swell-skills verify discovery, parsing, and catalog functionality.

VAL-SKILLS-002.notes: User testing validation: YAML frontmatter parsing extracts name and description correctly from SKILL.md files.

VAL-SKILLS-003.notes: User testing validation: Skill catalog contains name, description, and location for each discovered skill.

VAL-SKILLS-004.notes: User testing validation: Progressive disclosure - at startup, only name and description loaded for catalog (~50-100 tokens).

VAL-SKILLS-005.notes: User testing validation: Progressive disclosure - on skill activation, full SKILL.md body is loaded.

VAL-SKILLS-006.notes: User testing validation: On-demand resources - scripts/, references/, assets/ directories loaded only when explicitly requested.

VAL-SKILLS-007.notes: User testing validation: Model-driven activation - LLM can read catalog and match skills to tasks based on description keywords.

VAL-SKILLS-008.notes: User testing validation: Lenient validation - skills with missing optional frontmatter fields are accepted.

VAL-CROSS-001.notes: End-to-end task execution via CLI now working after cli-fix. Task creation, listing, watching, and cancel all verified.

VAL-MCP-001.notes: User testing validation: MCP protocol full implementation verified via 72 tests in swell-tools -- mcp. Tool annotations (readOnlyHint, destructiveHint, idempotentHint), outputSchema support, and dynamic tool discovery all verified working.

VAL-CLAW-001.notes: User testing validation: Transcript typed event log via cargo test (swell-core, 26 tests). 4 event types (ToolCall, LlmResponse, StateTransition, Error), append-only invariant verified, async subscriber filtering works correctly.

VAL-CLAW-002.notes: User testing validation: Session compaction via cargo test (swell-core, val_claw test). Compaction triggers at 50-turn threshold, ResumePacket preserves decisions, active files, pending actions, constraints, and tail turns.

VAL-CLAW-003.notes: User testing validation: Binary detection via cargo test (swell-tools, 18 tests). Magic bytes (ELF, PNG, JPEG, PDF, ZIP, etc.) and null byte detection. Binary files rejected by default, allowed with allow_binary=true returning base64-encoded content.

VAL-CLAW-004.notes: User testing validation: Approval decay via cargo test (swell-orchestrator, 7 tests). ApprovalDecayConfig with configurable decay, 80% completion threshold, failure-derived out-of-scope tasks requiring approval.
